prompt: A dark cinematic horror scene in a narrow rain-soaked urban alley at night, lit almost entirely by dim blue-black ambient light and a warm vertical Japanese hotel sign in the background. The sign glows on the left side and reads ホテル, with smaller vertical text beneath it, while distant city lights blur into soft bokeh through the heavy rain. In the foreground on the right, a young woman sits on the flooded ground with her back against a wet wall, knees bent and head hanging forward in exhaustion or despair. She has soaked shoulder-length dark hair plastered to her face and neck, a black wet jacket, a short plaid skirt, and chunky black lace-up combat boots. Her skin and clothing glisten with rain, and the shallow water on the ground reflects the neon sign and scattered highlights. Looming behind her in the center-left is a tall hooded grim reaper silhouette, draped in long ragged black robes that dissolve into shredded strands, holding one large curved scythe arcing above its head. Keep the reaper mostly in silhouette with only a faint rim light so it feels ghostly and threatening. The overall composition should be vertical, with 2 visible figures total: 1 seated woman and 1 reaper apparition. Style: hyper-realistic cinematic horror, moody noir atmosphere, high contrast, extremely dark shadows, wet textures, volumetric rain, reflective pavement, subtle filmic grain, ominous tension, photoreal lighting. Color palette: near-black, deep navy, muted charcoal, and warm amber highlights from the sign. No gore, no extra people, no daylight, no bright colors, no text overlays except the distant hotel sign.
